title: Rotary or carousel electric injection press
abstract: The invention is an electric rotary or carousel injection press (P) particularly suited to process plastic materials, comprising at least one rotary structure configured as a mould carrier carousel (2) provided with one or more mould carriers (6), at least one press structure (3) with at least one pressing system (4) for clamping said mould carriers (6) under pressure, and at least one injection unit (1) suited to inject a plastic material inside said moulds, and wherein all or part of the moving members of said press are powered electrically.
claims:
Claims 1. Rotary or carousel injection press (P) particularly suited to process plastic materials, comprising at least one rotary structure configured as a mould carrier carousel (2) provided with one or more mould carriers (6), at least one press structure (3) with at least one pressing system (4) for clamping said mould carriers (6) under pressure, and at least one injection unit (1) suited to inject a plastic material inside said moulds, characterized in that all or part of the moving members of said rotary structure (2), of said press structure (3), of said pressing system (4) and of said injection unit (1) are powered electrically. 2. Press (P) according to claim 1, characterized in that it comprises said at least one injection unit (1) provided with at least one plasticization screw (12) and at least one plasticization cylinder (13), wherein the motion of said at least one plasticization screw (12) is power assisted by at least one main electric motor (14). 3. Press (P) according to claim 1, characterized in that said at least one rotary structure configured as a mould carrier carousel (2) comprises a revolving structure (21) that revolves around a substantially vertical axis (Z), with supporting means (33) suited to support one or more mould carriers (6) distributed on a circumference, each mould carrier (6) being provided with a base (61) and an opening cover (62), and wherein said revolving structure (21) is set rotating by means of at least one electric motor (22). 4. Press (P) according to claim 1, characterized in that said at least one pressing system (4) comprises one or more servomechanisms (413, 421) suited to transmit a horizontal clamping force (A) as they act on said cover (62) and on said base (61) of each one of said mould carriers (6), and also a front clamping force (B) as they act with a front pressing unit (43) on the front portion (63) of each one of said mould carriers (6), and wherein said pressing system (4) comprises: 

â¢ a lower unit (41) acting on said base (61) of the mould carrier (6); â¢ an upper unit (42) acting on said cover (62) of the mould carrier (6). 5. Press (P) according to claim 2, characterized in that said at least one injection unit (1) comprises: â¢ at least one hopper or loading point (11) for loading the plastic material; â¢ said at least one plasticization cylinder (13), in which said plastic material is introduced; â¢ said at least one plasticization screw (12) suited to rotate axially and to translate axially inside said plasticization cylinder (13) in order to push the plastic material during the injection step; â¢ said at least one main electric motor (14) suited to transmit both the rotary motion of said plasticization screw (12) and the injection linear motion of said plasticization screw (12), and wherein said at least one main electric motor (14) has two shafts (141, 142), wherein each one of said shafts (141, 142) is mechanically connected to said plasticization screw (12) through one or more pulleys (151, 152) or transmission means (161, 162) and through at least one freewheel (171, 172) that allows the transmission of the rotary motion of said shafts (141, 142), alternated in the two opposite directions, to said at least one plasticization screw (12). 6. Press (P) according to claim 5, characterized in that one of said shafts (142), or rear shaft (142), of said main electric motor (14) is suited to mesh, through at least one rear freewheel (172), with one or more rear pulleys (152) and transmission means (162) that transmit the rotary motion to at least one mechanical jack (18) with recirculating ball screws that provides for transmitting the advance motion for the injection to said plasticization screw (12). 7. Press (P) according to claim 7, characterized in that said at least one 

 injection unit (1) also comprises at least one auxiliary electric motor (19) mechanically connected (191) to said mechanical jack (18) and suited to make said mechanical jack (18) move gradually backwards during the rotation of the plasticization screw (12), thus generating a counter-pressure on the melted plastic material for the purpose of improving the plasticization process and allowing a given quantity of material to be prepared for the successive injection. 8. Press (P) according to the preceding claims, characterized in that it comprises: â¢ a frame (31) substantially in the shape of a double C, with one C placed beside the other, and forming said press structure (3); â¢ at least one tie rod (32) forming the rotary shaft of said revolving structure (21) and suited to connect the ends (311) of said "C" shapes of said frame (31); â¢ said at least one motor or gear motor (22) suited to transmit the sequential rotation to said at least one tie rod (32); â¢ at least one main wheel or bearing ring (23) mechanically connected to said at least one motor or gear motor (22); â¢ at least one cam (24) suited to counteract said sequential rotation and to guide the descent, meaning the clamping movement, of said cover (62) of the mould carrier (6); â¢ one or more stop elements (25) for the correct positioning of said mould carriers (6) in the different steps of the sequence. 9. Press (P) according to claim 8, characterized in that said revolving structure (21) also comprises at least one second bearing ring (27) power assisted by a corresponding electric motor or gear motor (28), and wherein said second bearing ring (27) houses said at least one cam (24) for opening/clamping said cover (62), and wherein said second bearing ring (27) is suited to move said cam (24) step-by-step with said revolving structure (21) at a standstill in 

 order to allow the manual mould change manoeuvre to be performed. 10. Press (P) according to claim 4, characterized in that said lower unit (41) of said at least one pressing system (4) in turn comprises: â¢ at least one lever mechanism (41 1) with an inclined plane (412) suited to rest on the underside of a corresponding inclined plane (611) that is integral with said base (61) of said mould carrier (6); â¢ a servomechanism (413) with a cam (414) operating said lever mechanism (411), and wherein a rotation of said cam (414) by a given angle causes said inclined plane (412) of said lever mechanism (411) to be lifted, wherein said inclined plane (412), acting on said base (61) of said mould carrier (6), produces the horizontal clamping movement. 11. Press (P) according to claim 4, characterized in that said upper unit (42) of said at least one pressing system (4) in turn comprises at least one servomechanism (421) with cam, provided with a plane (422) suited to serve as a counteracting plane for said cover (62) of said mould carrier (6). 12. Press (P) according to the preceding claims, characterized in that said lower unit (41) and said upper unit (42) of said pressing system (4) are mechanically connected to said front pressing unit (43), and wherein the rotation of said cam (414) of the lower unit (41) and of said servomechanism (421) with cam of the upper unit (42) also causes said front pressing unit (43) to produce said front clamping movement (B). 13. Press (P) according to the preceding claims, characterized in that said injection unit (1) is double and comprises at least one pair of plasticization cylinders (131, 132), each one communicating with at least one corresponding injection nozzle (71, 72), and wherein said nozzles (71, 72) are telescopic in order to perform said cycle of approach to and corresponding pressure contact with said front portion (63) of said mould carrier (6).
